name: Alexis Lê-Quôc
background: Alexis Lê-Quôc is our co-founder and has served as our President, Chief Technology Officer and a member of our board of directors since our inception in 2010. Prior to founding Datadog, Mr. Lê-Quôc was a Director of Operations at Wireless Generation. Mr. Lê-Quôc holds an M.S. in Computer Science from the École Centrale Paris.

commpanies.name: Datadog, Inc.
commpanies.title_or_role: Director, President and Chief Technology Officer
